## What's New
{{CHANGELOG}}

## Requirements
* Magisk or KernelSU
* *For KSU* - A valid metamodule installed for partition mounting (e.g. `magic mount`, `mountify`, `overlayfs`)
* Signature spoofing support

## Install
1. Flash this module and Reboot.
2. Open the KernelSU / WebUI X manager and open this module's WebUI.
3. Download and install your preferred versions of microG GmsCore and microG Companion via the Installer tab.
4. Return to the Home tab and long-press "Promote" to push the apps to the system level.
5. Reboot to apply.

See [README](https://github.com/spacealtctrl/microg_installer_revived_again) for full details

---
Based on nift4's microG Installer Revived
